Resource Profile: Recommendation Justification

Defining URL:https://www.ceosys.de/fhir/StructureDefinition/recommendation-justification
Version:0.1.0
Name:RecommendationJustification
Title:Recommendation Justification
Status:Draft as of 2022-03-04
Definition:

Justification of a clinical guideline recommendation through the underlying evidence and their ratings

Publisher:CEOsys
Source Resource:XML / JSON / Turtle

The official URL for this profile is: 

https://www.ceosys.de/fhir/StructureDefinition/recommendation-justification

Guidance

This profile of a FHIR ArtifactAssessment is derived from the ArtifactAssessment FHIR resource.

Formal Views of Profile Content

Description of Profiles, Differentials, Snapshots and how the different presentations work.

  • Snapshot Table
  • Snapshot Table (Must Support)
  • Differential Table
  • Text Summary

relatedArtifact 1..1RelatedArtifactAdditional information
resourceReference Σ1..1Reference(Net Effect Estimate)What artifact, if not a conformance resource

Documentation for this format

This structure is derived from ArtifactAssessment

Summary

Mandatory: 10 elements (34 nested mandatory elements)
Must-Support: 20 elements

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • Recommendation Plan (https://www.ceosys.de/fhir/StructureDefinition/recommendation-plan)
  • Certainty of Evidence Rating (https://www.ceosys.de/fhir/StructureDefinition/certainty-of-evidence-rating)
  • Net Effect Estimate (https://www.ceosys.de/fhir/StructureDefinition/net-effect-estimate)

Extensions

This structure refers to these extensions:

  • https://www.ceosys.de/fhir/StructureDefinition/ceosys-extension-artifact-assessment-version
  • https://www.ceosys.de/fhir/StructureDefinition/ceosys-extension-artifact-assessment-publication-status

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element ArtifactAssessment.artifact[x] is sliced based on the value of type:$this
  • The element ArtifactAssessment.content is sliced based on the value of value:type (Closed)

 

Other representations of profile: CSV, Excel, Schematron

Terminology Bindings

PathConformanceValueSet / Code
